data.title: Pi Network Sees Major Backing From Kraken: Pi Coin Price Rally Imminent?
data.description:
Kraken has rolled out perpetual futures contracts for Pi Network’s native token, Pi, marking the token’s first entry into a major derivatives market. Traders can now go long or short Pi Coin with up to 20× leverage on Kraken Pro, using any of 40+ collateral options across 360+ markets.

data.title: Donald Trump’s Treasury Secretary Predicts $2 Trillion Stablecoin Boom
data.description:
Between November 5 and December 8, the total crypto market surged by 63. 36%, fueled by optimism around pro-crypto leadership. However, after Trump’s inauguration, market momentum began to cool as the administration adopted a cautious but strategic approach to crypto regulation
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/donald-trumps-treasury-secretary-predicts-2-trillion-stablecoin-boom/

data.title: Dogecoin Weekly Chart Shows Bitcoin-Like Movements That Could Trigger Massive Rally
data.description:
Crypto analyst DOGECAPITAL has highlighted a Bitcoin-like pattern on the Dogecoin chart, which could trigger a parabolic rally. Based on his analysis, this rally could send the DOGE price above $10, marking a new all-time high (ATH) for the top meme coin. Related Reading: XRP’s $5 Dream Ride Hinges On This One Chart Setup – Analyst The Bitcoin Historical Pattern Which Could Send Dogecoin Above $10 In an X post, DOGECAPITAL predicted that the Dogecoin price could rally above $10. He alluded to the weekly chart and compared the historical price cycles of Bitcoin and DOGE, while pointing out what tends to happen when BTC closes a weekly candle at all-time highs (ATHs)
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/dogecoin-weekly-chart-shows-bitcoin-like-movements-that-could-trigger-massive-rally/

data.description:

Cetus had been hacked for over $222 million, but Sui Validators were able to freeze $162 million of the stolen funds. According to Sui Network, the validators could freeze […]

data.title: Nvidia and Wallenberg Family Initiate AI Infrastructure Venture in Sweden
data.description: According to PANews, Nvidia and the Wallenberg family-backed business cluster are launching a venture to develop artificial intelligence infrastructure in Nordic countries. A statement released on Saturday reveals that companies such as AstraZeneca, Ericsson, Saab, Swedish Nordic SEB, and the Wallenberg family's investment institution will collaborate to create what is claimed to be the largest corporate AI supercomputer in Sweden. Nvidia plans to establish its first AI technology center in Sweden, partnering with industry leaders to advance research efforts. As part of this initiative, Saab announced its intention to deploy AI methods to enhance its defense capabilities.

data.title: Trump’s use of presidential seal at memecoin event raises legal questions
data.description:
President Donald Trump is facing scrutiny after speaking at a private event for top investors in his $TRUMP memecoin while standing behind a lectern emblazoned with the official presidential seal — a move that may violate federal law. The event took place Thursday at Trump National Golf Club in Virginia, where Trump addressed 220 investors in his cryptocurrency project. According to US law, the presidential seal cannot be used in any manner that could imply government approval or sponsorship. Violators can face fines or up to six months in prison
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/trump-presidential-seal-memecoin-dinner-legal-review?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: A Trump whale bought moonpig for $7,619, and its current value has reached $1.4 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a TRUMP whale invested $7,619 to buy moonpig and made a profit of $1.4 million, with a return rate of 181 times. On April 5, the whale created a new wallet "4ZYMAa" and spent $1 million to buy TRUMP tokens; on May 2, the whale spent 600 TRUMP ($7,619) to buy 16.44 million moonpigs, which are now worth $1.4 million; 2 hours ago, he sold all $RUMP tokens and made a profit of $435,000.

data.title: James Wynn increases Hyperliquid’s BTC long position to $1.23 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin’s monitoring, James Wynn increased Hyperliquid’s BTC long position to US$1.23 billion again, with 40x long orders of 11,404 BTC, a position value of US$1.23 billion, an opening price of US$108,921, and a liquidation price of US$105,100.
